basic_details.job_title: OFH Avadi Medical Practitioner Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factories Hospital Avadi (OFH Avadi) Medical Practitioner (Doctor) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of OFH Avadi. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the OFH Avadi Medical Practitioner (Doctor) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or Equivalent Degree Recognized by MCI / NMC
qualification.details: MBBS or Equivalent Degree Recognized by MCI / NMC. Candidate should be registered with Central/State Medical Council.

all_official_links.label: Download OFH Avadi Medical Practitioner (Doctor) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for OFH Avadi Medical Practitioner recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS or an Equivalent Degree Recognized by MCI / NMC and be registered with a Central/State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Practitioner post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Medical Practitioner (Doctor) position at Ordnance Factories Hospital Avadi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contractual role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly at the venue with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and registration certificates are essential.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Ordnance Factories Hospital Avadi located?
faq.answer: The hospital is located in Avadi, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600054.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Medical Practitioner position?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age limit restrictions for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits for this recruitment. It is advisable to check the detailed notification.
